requirement_topic.en: Cell and pack safety claims for lithium products
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电芯和电池组安全声明
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電芯和電池組安全聲明

summary.en: Safety expectations for imported portable lithium batteries are applied through UAE.S and GSO-aligned references, with IEC 62133-style design and abuse-test evidence commonly expected for pack and cell safety. The import chain usually checks chemistry, capacity class, and protection design details against the exact declared model.
summary.zh: 进口便携式锂电产品的安全预期通常通过UAE.S与GSO采纳体系执行，实践中常见IEC 62133风格的设计与滥用试验证据用于电芯和电池组安全。进口链条一般会按型号匹配化学体系、容量等级及保护设计细节。
summary.zht: 進口便攜式鋰電產品的安全預期通常透過UAE.S與GSO採納體系落實，實務中常見IEC 62133式的設計與濫用試驗證據用於電芯及電池組安全。進口鏈條一般按型號比對化學體系、容量等級與保護設計細節。

standards_or_laws: UAE.S / GSO references for battery safety context
IEC 62133 related thermal, vibration, impact, and electrical abuse test expectations

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 31241 and related standards for domestic battery safety submissions. Those test regimes remain valuable, but UAE evaluation often requires explicit mapping to UAE/Seller-facing declarations and model parameters.
summary.zh: 中国通常用GB 31241及相关体系进行国内电池安全提交。该测试体系有参考价值，但阿联酋通常仍要求将其映射到阿联酋或进口方可接受的声明结构和型号参数。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB 31241及相關體系進行國內電池安全提交。該測試體系有參考價值，但阿聯酋通常仍要求將其映射到阿聯酋或進口方可接受的聲明結構與型號參數。

gap.en: Technical overlap often exists, but UAE-facing review needs model-level mapping and declaration alignment. Generic Chinese test reports without model-specific UAE context are frequently insufficient in buyer/importer verification.
gap.zh: 技术上存在重叠，但阿联酋侧审核通常需要型号级映射和声明对齐。仅提交泛化的中文测试报告，若无阿联酋语境下的型号对应关系，常被认为不足。
gap.zht: 技術上存在重疊，但阿聯酋側審核通常需型號級映射與聲明對齊。若僅提交一般化的中文測試報告，且缺乏阿聯酋語境下的型號對應，常被視為不足。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the UAE route places the battery model in safety scope through MoIAT/ECAS-linked acceptance and distributor/importer review.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese categories under domestic GB/CNCA obligations; domestic proof does not automatically satisfy UAE destination filing.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The practical gap is usually alignment risk and declaration quality, not an absence of test evidence. Document model-to-model mapping first, then use IEC-based files to prove UAE-facing safety intent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 实务差距通常是对齐和声明质量问题，而非“缺少测试”。应先完成型号对型号映射，再用IEC体系文件证明阿联酋侧安全意图。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 實務差距通常是對齊與聲明品質問題，而非「缺乏測試」。應先完成型號對應映射，再以IEC體系文件證明阿聯酋側安全意圖。
